strong.p: I HAVE READ AND ACCEPTED THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS AS OUTLINED IN THE REVERSE SIDE OF THIS PAGE

tr.td: 1. If there is any complaint regarding the function or setup customer should inform it to the operator or marketing team within 6 hours after the event take place.
3. Payment should be made before the event.
